entities.description: The country where the randomised experiment was conducted

entities.description: The research design used to examine the effects of incentives on technology adoption

entities.description: Motivations provided to farmers to encourage the adoption of technology or knowledge sharing

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: The crop variety being adopted, specifically drought-tolerant varieties

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The specific characteristic of the maize varieties being studied

entities.name: SOCIAL RECOGNITION
entities.description: A type of incentive based on public acknowledgement or status

entities.name: DISSEMINATING FARMERS
entities.description: A random subset of trained farmers tasked with spreading knowledge to co-villagers

entities.name: KNOWLEDGE TRANSMISSION
entities.description: The process of passing information from disseminating farmers to their neighbours

entities.name: INFORMATION NETWORKS
entities.description: The structures of communication and interaction between farmers

entities.name: PRIVATE MATERIAL REWARDS
entities.description: A type of incentive involving tangible, private benefits

entities.name: KNOWLEDGE DIFFUSION
entities.description: The spread of information and technology throughout a community
